title: orchis densiflora
intro: Orchis densiflora, also known as the thick-spored orchid, is a species of orchid that is native to East Asia, particularly in Japan and Korea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Orchis densiflora include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers are typically dried and then used to make decoctions, infusions, or powders for medicinal purposes.
